[[sn:October 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 1일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初一]] [[zh:十月初一]] [[en:draft:October 1 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
<!--* Keichō17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[October 24]] ） - [[伊東満所]] 、[[天正遣欧使節]] の一人---「[[伊東マンショ]] 」では"10月21日"と記載--->
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}} 13th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|684 AD|ja|684年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|686 AD|ja|686年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Prince Ōtsu|ja|大津皇子}} was captured by Crown Prince {{ill|Kusakabe|ja|草壁皇子}} on suspicion of treason. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from {{ill|Shingokeiun|ja|神護景雲}} to Hōki. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – The grandson of {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}} , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|弘治}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Itsukushima|ja|厳島の戦い}} took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|毛利元就}} defeating those of {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587 AD|ja|1587年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|北野天満宮}} precincts, where {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉}} , with tea masters {{ill|Sen no Rikyū|ja|千利休}} , {{ill|Tsuda Sōkyū|ja|津田宗及}} , and {{ill|Imai Sōkyū|ja|今井宗久}} , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614 AD|ja|1614年}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1673 AD|ja|1673年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – The {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国藩}} constructed the {{ill|Kintaikyo Bridge|ja|錦帯橋}} .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|弘治}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1521 AD|ja|1521年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Mitsunari|ja|石田三成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1560 AD|ja|1560年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|小西行長}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555年}} ?). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Angokuji Eikyū|ja|安国寺恵瓊}} , a military commander (born circa {{ill|1539 AD|ja|1539年}} ?).
[[Category:New Pages]] [[ja:年表]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|30|10|2|9|1|11|10|1001}} [[Category:removing this]] [[sn:9月29日 (旧暦)|9月29日]] 。

revision.comment: Text replacement - "天武天皇" to "Emperor Tenmu"
revision.text:
[[sn:October 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 1일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初一]] [[zh:十月初一]] [[en:draft:October 1 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
<!--* Keichō17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[October 24]] ） - [[伊東満所]] 、[[天正遣欧使節]] の一人---「[[伊東マンショ]] 」では"10月21日"と記載--->
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} 13th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|684 AD|ja|684年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|686 AD|ja|686年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Prince Ōtsu|ja|大津皇子}} was captured by Crown Prince {{ill|Kusakabe|ja|草壁皇子}} on suspicion of treason. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from {{ill|Shingokeiun|ja|神護景雲}} to Hōki. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – The grandson of {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}} , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|弘治}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Itsukushima|ja|厳島の戦い}} took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|毛利元就}} defeating those of {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587 AD|ja|1587年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|北野天満宮}} precincts, where {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉}} , with tea masters {{ill|Sen no Rikyū|ja|千利休}} , {{ill|Tsuda Sōkyū|ja|津田宗及}} , and {{ill|Imai Sōkyū|ja|今井宗久}} , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614 AD|ja|1614年}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1673 AD|ja|1673年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – The {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国藩}} constructed the {{ill|Kintaikyo Bridge|ja|錦帯橋}} .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|弘治}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1521 AD|ja|1521年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Mitsunari|ja|石田三成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1560 AD|ja|1560年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|小西行長}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555年}} ?). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Angokuji Eikyū|ja|安国寺恵瓊}} , a military commander (born circa {{ill|1539 AD|ja|1539年}} ?).
[[Category:New Pages]] [[ja:年表]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|30|10|2|9|1|11|10|1001}} [[Category:removing this]] [[sn:9月29日 (旧暦)|9月29日]] 。

[[sn:October 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 1일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初一]] [[zh:十月初一]] [[en:draft:October 1 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
<!--* Keichō17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[October 24]] ） - [[伊東満所]] 、[[天正遣欧使節]] の一人---「[[伊東マンショ]] 」では"10月21日"と記載--->
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} 13th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|684 AD|ja|684年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|686 AD|ja|686年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Prince Ōtsu|ja|大津皇子}} was captured by Crown Prince {{ill|Kusakabe|ja|草壁皇子}} on suspicion of treason. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from {{ill|Shingokeiun|ja|神護景雲}} to Hōki. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – The grandson of {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}} , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Itsukushima|ja|厳島の戦い}} took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|Mōri Motonari}} defeating those of {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587 AD|ja|1587年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine}} precincts, where {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} , with tea masters {{ill|Sen no Rikyū|ja|千利休}} , {{ill|Tsuda Sōkyū|ja|津田宗及}} , and {{ill|Imai Sōkyū|ja|今井宗久}} , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614 AD|ja|1614年}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1673 AD|ja|1673年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – The {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国藩}} constructed the {{ill|Kintaikyo Bridge|ja|錦帯橋}} .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1521 AD|ja|1521年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Mitsunari|ja|石田三成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1560 AD|ja|1560年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555年}} ?). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Angokuji Eikyū|ja|安国寺恵瓊}} , a military commander (born circa {{ill|1539 AD|ja|1539年}} ?).

{{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Itsukushima|ja|厳島の戦い}} took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|Mōri Motonari}} defeating those of {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587 AD|ja|1587年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine}} precincts, where {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} , with tea masters {{ill|Sen no Rikyū|ja|千利休}} , {{ill|Tsuda Sōkyū|ja|津田宗及}} , and {{ill|Imai Sōkyū|ja|今井宗久}} , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614 AD|ja|1614年}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1673 AD|ja|1673年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – The {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国藩}} constructed the {{ill|Kintaikyo Bridge|ja|錦帯橋}} .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1521 AD|ja|1521年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Mitsunari|ja|石田三成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1560 AD|ja|1560年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555年}} ?). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Angokuji Eikyū|ja|安国寺恵瓊}} , a military commander (born circa {{ill|1539 AD|ja|1539年}} ?).

[[sn:October 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 1일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初一]] [[zh:十月初一]] [[en:draft:October 1 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
<!--* Keichō17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[October 24]] ） - [[伊東満所]] 、[[天正遣欧使節]] の一人---「[[伊東マンショ]] 」では"10月21日"と記載--->
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} 13th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|684 AD|ja|684年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|686 AD|ja|686年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Prince Ōtsu|ja|大津皇子}} was captured by Crown Prince {{ill|Kusakabe|ja|草壁皇子}} on suspicion of treason. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from {{ill|Shingokeiun|ja|神護景雲}} to Hōki. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – The grandson of {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}} , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Itsukushima|ja|厳島の戦い}} took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|Mōri Motonari}} defeating those of {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587 AD|ja|1587年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine}} precincts, where {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} , with tea masters {{ill|Sen no Rikyū|ja|千利休}} , {{ill|Tsuda Sōkyū|ja|津田宗及}} , and {{ill|Imai Sōkyū|ja|今井宗久}} , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614 AD|ja|1614年}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1673 AD|ja|1673年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – The {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国藩}} constructed the {{ill|Kintaikyo Bridge|ja|錦帯橋}} .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1521 AD|ja|1521年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Mitsunari|ja|石田三成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1560 AD|ja|1560年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555年}} ?). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Angokuji Eikyū|ja|安国寺恵瓊}} , a military commander (born circa {{ill|1539 AD|ja|1539年}} ?).
[[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: tier 1]] [[ja:年表]] == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|30|10|2|9|1|11|10|1001}} [[Category:removing this]] [[sn:9月29日 (旧暦)|9月29日]] 。

revision.comment: Text replacement - "== See Also! ==" to "== See Also =="
revision.text:
[[sn:October 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 1일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初一]] [[zh:十月初一]] [[en:draft:October 1 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
<!--* Keichō17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[October 24]] ） - [[伊東満所]] 、[[天正遣欧使節]] の一人---「[[伊東マンショ]] 」では"10月21日"と記載--->
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} 13th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|684 AD|ja|684年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|686 AD|ja|686年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Prince Ōtsu|ja|大津皇子}} was captured by Crown Prince {{ill|Kusakabe|ja|草壁皇子}} on suspicion of treason. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from {{ill|Shingokeiun|ja|神護景雲}} to Hōki. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – The grandson of {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}} , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Itsukushima|ja|厳島の戦い}} took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|Mōri Motonari}} defeating those of {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587 AD|ja|1587年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine}} precincts, where {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} , with tea masters {{ill|Sen no Rikyū|ja|千利休}} , {{ill|Tsuda Sōkyū|ja|津田宗及}} , and {{ill|Imai Sōkyū|ja|今井宗久}} , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614 AD|ja|1614年}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1673 AD|ja|1673年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – The {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国藩}} constructed the {{ill|Kintaikyo Bridge|ja|錦帯橋}} .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1521 AD|ja|1521年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Mitsunari|ja|石田三成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1560 AD|ja|1560年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555年}} ?). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Angokuji Eikyū|ja|安国寺恵瓊}} , a military commander (born circa {{ill|1539 AD|ja|1539年}} ?).
[[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: tier 1]] [[ja:年表]] == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|30|10|2|9|1|11|10|1001}} [[Category:removing this]] [[sn:9月29日 (旧暦)|9月29日]] 。

[[sn:October 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 1일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初一]] [[zh:十月初一]] [[en:draft:October 1 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
<!--* Keichō17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[October 24]] ） - [[伊東満所]] 、[[天正遣欧使節]] の一人---「[[伊東マンショ]] 」では"10月21日"と記載--->
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} 13th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|684 AD|ja|684th year }} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|686 AD|ja|686年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Prince Ōtsu|ja|大津皇子}} was captured by Crown Prince {{ill|Kusakabe|ja|草壁皇子}} on suspicion of treason. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from {{ill|Shingokeiun|ja|神護景雲}} to Hōki. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – The grandson of {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}} , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Itsukushima|ja|厳島の戦い}} took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|Mōri Motonari}} defeating those of {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587 AD|ja|1587年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine}} precincts, where {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} , with tea masters {{ill|Sen no Rikyū|ja|千利休}} , {{ill|Tsuda Sōkyū|ja|津田宗及}} , and {{ill|Imai Sōkyū|ja|今井宗久}} , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614 AD|ja|1614th year }} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1673 AD|ja|1673rd year }} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – The {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国藩}} constructed the {{ill|Kintaikyo Bridge|ja|錦帯橋}} .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1521 AD|ja|1521st year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Mitsunari|ja|石田三成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1560 AD|ja|1560年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555年}} ?). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Angokuji Eikyū|ja|安国寺恵瓊}} , a military commander (born circa {{ill|1539 AD|ja|1539年}} ?).

[[sn:October 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 1일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初一]] [[zh:十月初一]] [[en:draft:October 1 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
<!--* Keichō17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[October 24]] ） - [[伊東満所]] 、[[天正遣欧使節]] の一人---「[[伊東マンショ]] 」では"10月21日"と記載--->
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} 13th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|684 AD|ja|684th year }} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|686 AD|ja|686th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Prince Ōtsu|ja|大津皇子}} was captured by Crown Prince {{ill|Kusakabe|ja|草壁皇子}} on suspicion of treason. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from {{ill|Shingokeiun|ja|神護景雲}} to Hōki. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – The grandson of {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}} , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year }} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Itsukushima|ja|厳島の戦い}} took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|Mōri Motonari}} defeating those of {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587 AD|ja|1587th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine}} precincts, where {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} , with tea masters {{ill|Sen no Rikyū|ja|千利休}} , {{ill|Tsuda Sōkyū|ja|津田宗及}} , and {{ill|Imai Sōkyū|ja|今井宗久}} , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614 AD|ja|1614th year }} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1673 AD|ja|1673rd year }} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – The {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国藩}} constructed the {{ill|Kintaikyo Bridge|ja|錦帯橋}} .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year }} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1521 AD|ja|1521st year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Mitsunari|ja|石田三成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1560 AD|ja|1560th year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year }} ?). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Angokuji Eikyū|ja|安国寺恵瓊}} , a military commander (born circa {{ill|1539 AD|ja|1539th year }} ?).
[[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: tier 1]] [[ja:年表]] == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|30|10|2|9|1|11|10|1001}} [[Category:removing this]] [[sn:9月29日 (旧暦)|9月29日]] 。

[[sn:October 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 1일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初一]] [[zh:十月初一]] [[en:draft:October 1 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
<!--* Keichō17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[October 24]] ） - [[伊東満所]] 、[[天正遣欧使節]] の一人---「[[伊東マンショ]] 」では"10月21日"と記載--->
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} 13th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|684 AD|ja|684th year }} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|686 AD|ja|686th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Prince Ōtsu|ja|大津皇子}} was captured by Crown Prince {{ill|Kusakabe|ja|草壁皇子}} on suspicion of treason. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from {{ill|Shingokeiun|ja|神護景雲}} to Hōki. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – The grandson of {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}} , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year }} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Itsukushima|ja|厳島の戦い}} took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|Mōri Motonari}} defeating those of {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587 AD|ja|1587th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine}} precincts, where {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} , with tea masters {{ill|Sen no Rikyū|ja|千利休}} , {{ill|Tsuda Sōkyū|ja|津田宗及}} , and {{ill|Imai Sōkyū|ja|今井宗久}} , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614 AD|ja|1614th year }} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1673 AD|ja|1673rd year }} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – The {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国藩}} constructed the {{ill|Kintaikyo Bridge|ja|錦帯橋}} .

{{ill|Kusakabe|ja|草壁皇子}} on suspicion of treason. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from {{ill|Shingokeiun|ja|神護景雲}} to Hōki. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – The grandson of {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}} , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year }} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Itsukushima|ja|厳島の戦い}} took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|Mōri Motonari}} defeating those of {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587 AD|ja|1587th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine}} precincts, where {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} , with tea masters {{ill|Sen no Rikyū|ja|千利休}} , {{ill|Tsuda Sōkyū|ja|津田宗及}} , and {{ill|Imai Sōkyū|ja|今井宗久}} , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614 AD|ja|1614th year }} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1673 AD|ja|1673rd year }} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – The {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国藩}} constructed the {{ill|Kintaikyo Bridge|ja|錦帯橋}} .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year }} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1521 AD|ja|1521st year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Mitsunari|ja|石田三成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1560 AD|ja|1560th year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year }} ?). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Angokuji Eikyū|ja|安国寺恵瓊}} , a military commander (born circa {{ill|1539 AD|ja|1539th year }} ?).

[[sn:October 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 1일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初一]] [[zh:十月初一]] [[en:draft:October 1 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
<!--* Keichō17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[October 24]] ） - [[伊東満所]] 、[[天正遣欧使節]] の一人---「[[伊東マンショ]] 」では"10月21日"と記載--->
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} 13th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|684 AD|ja|684th year }} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|686 AD|ja|686th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Prince Ōtsu|ja|大津皇子}} was captured by Crown Prince {{ill|Kusakabe|ja|草壁皇子}} on suspicion of treason. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from {{ill|Shingokeiun|ja|神護景雲}} to Hōki. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – The grandson of {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}} , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year }} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Itsukushima|ja|厳島の戦い}} took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|Mōri Motonari}} defeating those of {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587 AD|ja|1587th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine}} precincts, where {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} , with tea masters {{ill|Sen no Rikyū|ja|千利休}} , {{ill|Tsuda Sōkyū|ja|津田宗及}} , and {{ill|Imai Sōkyū|ja|今井宗久}} , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614 AD|ja|1614th year }} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1673 AD|ja|1673rd year }} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – The {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国藩}} constructed the {{ill|Kintaikyo Bridge|ja|錦帯橋}} .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year }} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1521 AD|ja|1521st year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Mitsunari|ja|石田三成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1560 AD|ja|1560th year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year }} ?). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Angokuji Eikyū|ja|安国寺恵瓊}} , a military commander (born circa {{ill|1539 AD|ja|1539th year }} ?).
[[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: tier 1]] [[ja:年表]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|30|10|2|9|1|11|10|1001}} [[Category:removing this]] [[sn:9月29日 (旧暦)|9月29日]] 。

[[sn:October 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 1일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初一]] [[zh:十月初一]] [[en:draft:October 1 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
<!--* Keichō17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[October 24]] ） - [[伊東満所]] 、[[天正遣欧使節]] の一人---「[[伊東マンショ]] 」では"10月21日"と記載--->
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} 13th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|684 AD|ja|684th year }} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|686 AD|ja|686th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Prince Ōtsu|ja|大津皇子}} was captured by Crown Prince {{ill|Kusakabe|ja|草壁皇子}} on suspicion of treason. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from {{ill|Shingokeiun|ja|神護景雲}} to Hōki. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – The grandson of {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}} , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year }} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Itsukushima|ja|厳島の戦い}} took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|Mōri Motonari}} defeating those of {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587 AD|ja|1587th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine}} precincts, where {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} , with tea masters {{ill|Sen no Rikyū|ja|千利休}} , {{ill|Tsuda Sōkyū|ja|津田宗及}} , and {{ill|Imai Sōkyū|ja|今井宗久}} , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614 AD|ja|1614th year }} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1673 AD|ja|1673rd year }} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – The {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国藩}} constructed the {{ill|Kintaikyo Bridge|ja|錦帯橋}} .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year }} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1521 AD|ja|1521st year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Mitsunari|ja|石田三成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1560 AD|ja|1560th year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year }} ?). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Angokuji Eikyū|ja|安国寺恵瓊}} , a military commander (born circa {{ill|1539 AD|ja|1539th year }} ?).
[[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category: tier 1]] [[ja:年表]]

{{ill|Tsuda Sōkyū|ja|津田宗及}} , and {{ill|Imai Sōkyū|ja|今井宗久}} , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614 AD|ja|1614th year }} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1673 AD|ja|1673rd year }} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – The {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国藩}} constructed the {{ill|Kintaikyo Bridge|ja|錦帯橋}} .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year }} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1521 AD|ja|1521st year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Mitsunari|ja|石田三成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1560 AD|ja|1560th year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year }} ?). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Angokuji Eikyū|ja|安国寺恵瓊}} , a military commander (born circa {{ill|1539 AD|ja|1539th year }} ?).

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Japanese Traditional Lunar Months" to "Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months"
revision.text:
[[sn:October 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 1일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初一]] [[zh:十月初一]] [[en:draft:October 1 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
<!--* Keichō17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[October 24]] ） - [[伊東満所]] 、[[天正遣欧使節]] の一人---「[[伊東マンショ]] 」では"10月21日"と記載--->
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} 13th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|684 AD|ja|684th year }} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|686 AD|ja|686th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Prince Ōtsu|ja|大津皇子}} was captured by Crown Prince {{ill|Kusakabe|ja|草壁皇子}} on suspicion of treason. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from {{ill|Shingokeiun|ja|神護景雲}} to Hōki. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – The grandson of {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}} , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year }} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Itsukushima|ja|厳島の戦い}} took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|Mōri Motonari}} defeating those of {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587 AD|ja|1587th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine}} precincts, where {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} , with tea masters {{ill|Sen no Rikyū|ja|千利休}} , {{ill|Tsuda Sōkyū|ja|津田宗及}} , and {{ill|Imai Sōkyū|ja|今井宗久}} , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614 AD|ja|1614th year }} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1673 AD|ja|1673rd year }} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – The {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国藩}} constructed the {{ill|Kintaikyo Bridge|ja|錦帯橋}} .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year }} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1521 AD|ja|1521st year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Mitsunari|ja|石田三成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1560 AD|ja|1560th year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year }} ?). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Angokuji Eikyū|ja|安国寺恵瓊}} , a military commander (born circa {{ill|1539 AD|ja|1539th year }} ?).
[[Category:Completion tier 1]][[ja:年表]]

<!--* Keichō17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[October 24]] ） - [[伊東満所]] 、[[天正遣欧使節]] の一人---「[[伊東マンショ]] 」では"10月21日"と記載--->
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=draft}} 13th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|684 AD|ja|684th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日|12=draft}} ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|686 AD|ja|686th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Prince Ōtsu|ja|大津皇子|12=draft}} was captured by Crown Prince {{ill|Kusakabe|ja|草壁皇子|12=draft}} on suspicion of treason. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft}} ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from {{ill|Shingokeiun|ja|神護景雲|12=draft}} to Hōki. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft}} ) – The grandson of {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇|12=draft}} , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Itsukushima|ja|厳島の戦い|12=draft}} took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|Mōri Motonari|12=draft}} defeating those of {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1587 AD|ja|1587th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft}} ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|12=draft}} precincts, where {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|12=draft}} , with tea masters {{ill|Sen no Rikyū|ja|千利休|12=draft}} , {{ill|Tsuda Sōkyū|ja|津田宗及|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Imai Sōkyū|ja|今井宗久|12=draft}} , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 19th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1614 AD|ja|1614th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康|12=draft}} ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1673 AD|ja|1673rd year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国藩|12=draft}} constructed the {{ill|Kintaikyo Bridge|ja|錦帯橋|12=draft}} .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1521 AD|ja|1521st year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Mitsunari|ja|石田三成|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1560 AD|ja|1560th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga|12=draft}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year|12=draft}} ?). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Angokuji Eikyū|ja|安国寺恵瓊|12=draft}} , a military commander (born circa {{ill|1539 AD|ja|1539th year|12=draft}} ?).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|30|10|2|9|1|11|10|1001}} 。
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初一]]

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初一]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft}} .

{{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Itsukushima|ja|厳島の戦い|12=draft}} took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|Mōri Motonari|12=draft}} defeating those of {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1587 AD|ja|1587th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft}} ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|12=draft}} precincts, where {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|12=draft}} , with tea masters {{ill|Sen no Rikyū|ja|千利休|12=draft}} , {{ill|Tsuda Sōkyū|ja|津田宗及|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Imai Sōkyū|ja|今井宗久|12=draft}} , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 19th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1614 AD|ja|1614th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康|12=draft}} ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1673 AD|ja|1673rd year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国藩|12=draft}} constructed the [[cdo:10 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初一]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft}} .
<!--* Keichō17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[October 24]] ） - [[伊東満所]] 、[[天正遣欧使節]] の一人---「[[伊東マンショ]] 」では"10月21日"と記載--->
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=draft}} 13th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|684 AD|ja|684th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日|12=draft}} ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|686 AD|ja|686th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Prince Ōtsu|ja|大津皇子|12=draft}} was captured by Crown Prince {{ill|Kusakabe|ja|草壁皇子|12=draft}} on suspicion of treason. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft}} ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from {{ill|Shingokeiun|ja|神護景雲|12=draft}} to Hōki. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft}} ) – The grandson of {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇|12=draft}} , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Itsukushima|ja|厳島の戦い|12=draft}} took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|Mōri Motonari|12=draft}} defeating those of {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1587 AD|ja|1587th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft}} ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|12=draft}} precincts, where {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|12=draft}} , with tea masters {{ill|Sen no Rikyū|ja|千利休|12=draft}} , {{ill|Tsuda Sōkyū|ja|津田宗及|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Imai Sōkyū|ja|今井宗久|12=draft}} , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 19th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1614 AD|ja|1614th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康|12=draft}} ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1673 AD|ja|1673rd year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国藩|12=draft}} constructed the {{ill|Kintaikyo Bridge|ja|錦帯橋|12=draft}} .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1521 AD|ja|1521st year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Mitsunari|ja|石田三成|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1560 AD|ja|1560th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga|12=draft}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year|12=draft}} ?). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Angokuji Eikyū|ja|安国寺恵瓊|12=draft}} , a military commander (born circa {{ill|1539 AD|ja|1539th year|12=draft}} ?).

Rikyū|ja|千利休|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Tsuda Sōkyū|ja|津田宗及|12=draft|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Imai Sōkyū|ja|今井宗久|12=draft|12=draft}} , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|686 AD|ja|686th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Prince Ōtsu|ja|大津皇子|12=draft|12=draft}} was captured by Crown Prince {{ill|Kusakabe|ja|草壁皇子|12=draft|12=draft}} on suspicion of treason. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from {{ill|Shingokeiun|ja|神護景雲|12=draft|12=draft}} to Hōki. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The grandson of {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Itsukushima|ja|厳島の戦い|12=draft|12=draft}} took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|Mōri Motonari|12=draft|12=draft}} defeating those of {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1587 AD|ja|1587th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|12=draft|12=draft}} precincts, where {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|12=draft|12=draft}} , with tea masters {{ill|Sen no Rikyū|ja|千利休|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Tsuda Sōkyū|ja|津田宗及|12=draft|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Imai Sōkyū|ja|今井宗久|12=draft|12=draft}} , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 19th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1614 AD|ja|1614th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康|12=draft|12=draft}} ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1673 AD|ja|1673rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国藩|12=draft|12=draft}} constructed the {{ill|Kintaikyo Bridge|ja|錦帯橋|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1521 AD|ja|1521st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Mitsunari|ja|石田三成|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1560 AD|ja|1560th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ?). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Angokuji Eikyū|ja|安国寺恵瓊|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born circa {{ill|1539 AD|ja|1539th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ?).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|30|10|2|9|1|11|10|1001}} 。
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初一]]

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初一]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft}} .
<!--* Keichō17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[October 24]] ） - [[伊東満所]] 、[[天正遣欧使節]] の一人---「[[伊東マンショ]] 」では"10月21日"と記載--->
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=draft|12=draft}} 13th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|684 AD|ja|684th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|686 AD|ja|686th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Prince Ōtsu|ja|大津皇子|12=draft|12=draft}} was captured by Crown Prince {{ill|Kusakabe|ja|草壁皇子|12=draft|12=draft}} on suspicion of treason. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from {{ill|Shingokeiun|ja|神護景雲|12=draft|12=draft}} to Hōki. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The grandson of {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Itsukushima|ja|厳島の戦い|12=draft|12=draft}} took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|Mōri Motonari|12=draft|12=draft}} defeating those of {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1587 AD|ja|1587th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|12=draft|12=draft}} precincts, where {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|12=draft|12=draft}} , with tea masters {{ill|Sen no Rikyū|ja|千利休|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Tsuda Sōkyū|ja|津田宗及|12=draft|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Imai Sōkyū|ja|今井宗久|12=draft|12=draft}} , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 19th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1614 AD|ja|1614th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康|12=draft|12=draft}} ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1673 AD|ja|1673rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国藩|12=draft|12=draft}} constructed the {{ill|Kintaikyo Bridge|ja|錦帯橋|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1521 AD|ja|1521st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Mitsunari|ja|石田三成|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1560 AD|ja|1560th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ?). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Angokuji Eikyū|ja|安国寺恵瓊|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born circa {{ill|1539 AD|ja|1539th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ?).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|30|10|2|9|1|11|10|1001}} 。
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初一]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:removing this]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar October]] [[Category:Butsumetsu]] [[Category:Days 1 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:October 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 1일]] [[ja:10月1日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十月初一]] [[en:draft:October 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ja:年表]] [[sn:9月29日 (旧暦)|9月29日]] [[sn:ctober 1 (Lunisolar)]]

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初一]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft}} .
<!--* Keichō17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[October 24]] ） - [[伊東満所]] 、[[天正遣欧使節]] の一人---「[[伊東マンショ]] 」では"10月21日"と記載--->
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=draft|12=draft}} 13th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|684 AD|ja|684th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|686 AD|ja|686th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Prince Ōtsu|ja|大津皇子|12=draft|12=draft}} was captured by Crown Prince {{ill|Kusakabe|ja|草壁皇子|12=draft|12=draft}} on suspicion of treason. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from {{ill|Shingokeiun|ja|神護景雲|12=draft|12=draft}} to Hōki. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The grandson of {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Itsukushima|ja|厳島の戦い|12=draft|12=draft}} took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|Mōri Motonari|12=draft|12=draft}} defeating those of {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1587 AD|ja|1587th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|12=draft|12=draft}} precincts, where {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|12=draft|12=draft}} , with tea masters {{ill|Sen no Rikyū|ja|千利休|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Tsuda Sōkyū|ja|津田宗及|12=draft|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Imai Sōkyū|ja|今井宗久|12=draft|12=draft}} , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 19th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1614 AD|ja|1614th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康|12=draft|12=draft}} ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1673 AD|ja|1673rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国藩|12=draft|12=draft}} constructed the {{ill|Kintaikyo Bridge|ja|錦帯橋|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1521 AD|ja|1521st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Mitsunari|ja|石田三成|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1560 AD|ja|1560th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ?). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Angokuji Eikyū|ja|安国寺恵瓊|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born circa {{ill|1539 AD|ja|1539th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ?).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|30|10|2|9|1|11|10|1001}} 。
