== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1521 AD|ja|1521st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Mitsunari|ja|石田三成|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1560 AD|ja|1560th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ?). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Angokuji Eikyū|ja|安国寺恵瓊|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born circa {{ill|1539 AD|ja|1539th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ?).

<!--* Keichō17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[October 24]] ） - [[伊東満所]] 、[[天正遣欧使節]] の一人---「[[伊東マンショ]] 」では"10月21日"と記載--->

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Jawiki date templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初一]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 13th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|684 AD|ja|684th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|686 AD|ja|686th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Prince Ōtsu|ja|大津皇子|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} was captured by Crown Prince {{ill|Kusakabe|ja|草壁皇子|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} on suspicion of treason. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from {{ill|Shingokeiun|ja|神護景雲|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to Hōki. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The grandson of {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Itsukushima|ja|厳島の戦い|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|Mōri Motonari|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} defeating those of {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1587 AD|ja|1587th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} precincts, where {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , with tea masters {{ill|Sen no Rikyū|ja|千利休|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Tsuda Sōkyū|ja|津田宗及|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Imai Sōkyū|ja|今井宗久|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 19th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1614 AD|ja|1614th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1673 AD|ja|1673rd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国藩|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} constructed the {{ill|Kintaikyo Bridge|ja|錦帯橋|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1521 AD|ja|1521st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Mitsunari|ja|石田三成|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1560 AD|ja|1560th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ?). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Angokuji Eikyū|ja|安国寺恵瓊|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born circa {{ill|1539 AD|ja|1539th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ?).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|30|10|2|9|1|11|10|1001}} 。
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初一]]

[[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:October 1 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:October 1 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:October 1 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-yue:十月初一]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 13th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|684 AD|ja|684th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|686 AD|ja|686th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Prince Ōtsu|ja|大津皇子|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} was captured by Crown Prince {{ill|Kusakabe|ja|草壁皇子|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} on suspicion of treason. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from {{ill|Shingokeiun|ja|神護景雲|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to Hōki. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The grandson of {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Itsukushima|ja|厳島の戦い|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|Mōri Motonari|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} defeating those of {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1587 AD|ja|1587th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} precincts, where {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , with tea masters {{ill|Sen no Rikyū|ja|千利休|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Tsuda Sōkyū|ja|津田宗及|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Imai Sōkyū|ja|今井宗久|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 19th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1614 AD|ja|1614th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1673 AD|ja|1673rd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国藩|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} constructed the {{ill|Kintaikyo Bridge|ja|錦帯橋|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1521 AD|ja|1521st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Mitsunari|ja|石田三成|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1560 AD|ja|1560th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ?). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Angokuji Eikyū|ja|安国寺恵瓊|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born circa {{ill|1539 AD|ja|1539th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ?).

[[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:October 1 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:October 1 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:October 1 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:October 1 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:October 1 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:October 1 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-yue:十月初一]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 13th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|684 AD|ja|684th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|686 AD|ja|686th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Prince Ōtsu|ja|大津皇子|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} was captured by Crown Prince {{ill|Kusakabe|ja|草壁皇子|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} on suspicion of treason. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from {{ill|Shingokeiun|ja|神護景雲|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to Hōki. * {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|770 AD|ja|770th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The grandson of {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Itsukushima|ja|厳島の戦い|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|Mōri Motonari|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} defeating those of {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1587 AD|ja|1587th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} precincts, where {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , with tea masters {{ill|Sen no Rikyū|ja|千利休|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Tsuda Sōkyū|ja|津田宗及|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Imai Sōkyū|ja|今井宗久|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 19th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1614 AD|ja|1614th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1673 AD|ja|1673rd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国藩|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} constructed the {{ill|Kintaikyo Bridge|ja|錦帯橋|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tōharaken|ja|陶晴賢|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1521 AD|ja|1521st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Mitsunari|ja|石田三成|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1560 AD|ja|1560th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa {{ill|1555 AD|ja|1555th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ?). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600 AD|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Angokuji Eikyū|ja|安国寺恵瓊|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born circa {{ill|1539 AD|ja|1539th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ?).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|30|10|2|9|1|11|10|1001}} 。

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .

revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月1日'''（きゅうれきじゅうがつついたち）は、[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の1日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== 出来事 == * [[天武天皇]]13年（[[ユリウス暦]][[684年]][[11月13日]]） - 八色の[[姓]]を制定。真人・朝臣・宿禰・忌寸・道師・臣・連・稲置の8種{{要出典|date=2021-04}} * [[朱鳥]]元年（ユリウス暦[[686年]][[10月23日]]） - [[大津皇子]]が謀叛の疑いで皇太子・[[草壁皇子]]に捕えられる * [[宝亀]]元年（ユリウス暦[[770年]][[10月23日]]） - 瑞亀献上により[[神護景雲]]から宝亀に[[改元]] * 宝亀元年（ユリウス暦770年10月23日） - [[天智天皇]]の孫・白壁王が即位し第49代・[[光仁天皇]]に * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1555年]][[10月16日]]） - [[厳島の戦い]]。[[毛利元就]]軍が[[陶晴賢]]軍を破る * [[天正]]15年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1587年]][[11月1日]]） - [[北野大茶湯]]。[[豊臣秀吉]]が京都・[[北野天満宮]]の境内で[[千利休]]・[[津田宗及]]・[[今井宗久]]を茶頭に千人の大[[茶会]]を開く * [[慶長]]19年（グレゴリオ暦[[1614年]][[11月2日]]） - [[徳川家康]]が諸大名に出陣の命を下し、[[大坂の陣#大坂冬の陣|大坂冬の陣]]が始まる * [[延宝]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1673年]][[11月9日]]） - [[岩国藩]]が[[錦帯橋]]を架橋
== 忌日 == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1555年]][[10月16日]]） - [[陶晴賢]]、[[武将]]（* [[1521年]]） * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1600年]][[11月6日]]） - [[石田三成]]、武将（* [[1560年]]） * 慶長5年（グレゴリオ暦1600年11月6日） - [[小西行長]]、[[キリシタン大名]]（* [[1555年]]?） * 慶長5年（グレゴリオ暦1600年11月6日） - [[安国寺恵瓊]]、武将（* [[1539年]]?） <!---* 慶長17年（グレゴリオ暦[[1612年]][[10月24日]]） - [[伊東満所]]、[[天正遣欧使節]]の一人---「[[伊東マンショ]]」では"10月21日"と記載--->
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|30|10|2|9|1|11|10|1001}} ※ただし、[[小の月]]の前日は[[9月29日 (旧暦)|9月29日]]。

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[10月1日 (旧暦)]] to [[October 1 (Lunisolar)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import

{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月1日'''（きゅうれきじゅうがつついたち）は、[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の1日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== 出来事 == * [[天武天皇]]13年（[[ユリウス暦]][[684年]][[11月13日]]） - 八色の[[姓]]を制定。真人・朝臣・宿禰・忌寸・道師・臣・連・稲置の8種{{要出典|date=2021-04}} * [[朱鳥]]元年（ユリウス暦[[686年]][[10月23日]]） - [[大津皇子]]が謀叛の疑いで皇太子・[[草壁皇子]]に捕えられる * [[宝亀]]元年（ユリウス暦[[770年]][[10月23日]]） - 瑞亀献上により[[神護景雲]]から宝亀に[[改元]] * 宝亀元年（ユリウス暦770年10月23日） - [[天智天皇]]の孫・白壁王が即位し第49代・[[光仁天皇]]に * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1555年]][[10月16日]]） - [[厳島の戦い]]。[[毛利元就]]軍が[[陶晴賢]]軍を破る * [[天正]]15年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1587年]][[11月1日]]） - [[北野大茶湯]]。[[豊臣秀吉]]が京都・[[北野天満宮]]の境内で[[千利休]]・[[津田宗及]]・[[今井宗久]]を茶頭に千人の大[[茶会]]を開く * [[慶長]]19年（グレゴリオ暦[[1614年]][[11月2日]]） - [[徳川家康]]が諸大名に出陣の命を下し、[[大坂の陣#大坂冬の陣|大坂冬の陣]]が始まる * [[延宝]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1673年]][[11月9日]]） - [[岩国藩]]が[[錦帯橋]]を架橋
== 忌日 == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1555年]][[10月16日]]） - [[陶晴賢]]、[[武将]]（* [[1521年]]） * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1600年]][[11月6日]]） - [[石田三成]]、武将（* [[1560年]]） * 慶長5年（グレゴリオ暦1600年11月6日） - [[小西行長]]、[[キリシタン大名]]（* [[1555年]]?） * 慶長5年（グレゴリオ暦1600年11月6日） - [[安国寺恵瓊]]、武将（* [[1539年]]?） <!---* 慶長17年（グレゴリオ暦[[1612年]][[10月24日]]） - [[伊東満所]]、[[天正遣欧使節]]の一人---「[[伊東マンショ]]」では"10月21日"と記載--->
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|30|10|2|9|1|11|10|1001}} ※ただし、[[小の月]]の前日は[[9月29日 (旧暦)|9月29日]]。

Text replacement - "<!--hatnote-->" to "[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->"
Bot: remove invalid enwiki interwiki links
Bot: prepend Wikidata AFC comment via pages.txt
Text replacement - "|Emperor Tenmu|" to "|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|"
Text replacement - "|Mōri Motonari|" to "|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|"
Bot: remove incorrect Shona (sn:) interwiki links
Bot: categorize based on Wikidata P11250 property

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840217]] Wikidata name: 1st day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 1|qq=October 1}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 1일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 13th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:684|684 AD]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:686|686 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – [[:en:Prince Ōtsu|Prince Ōtsu]] was captured by Crown Prince [[:en:Prince Kusakabe|Kusakabe]] on suspicion of treason. * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from [[:en:Jingo-keiun|Shingokeiun]] to Hōki. * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The grandson of [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]] , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Emperor Kōnin]] . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Miyajima|Battle of Itsukushima]] took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|ja|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Motonari|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1156545}} defeating those of [[:en:Sue Harukata|Tōharaken]] . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587 AD]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Tenmangū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} precincts, where [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] , with tea masters [[:en:Sen no Rikyū|Sen no Rikyū]] , [[:en:Tsuda Sōgyū|Tsuda Sōkyū]] , and [[:en:Imai Sōkyū|Imai Sōkyū]] , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614 AD]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1673|1673 AD]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – The [[:en:Iwakuni Domain|Iwakuni Domain]] constructed the [[:en:Kintai Bridge|Kintaikyo Bridge]] .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Sue Harukata|Tōharaken]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1521|1521 AD]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Mitsunari|Ishida Mitsunari]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1560|1560 AD]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konishi Yukinaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] ?). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – [[:en:Ankokuji Ekei|Angokuji Eikyū]] , a military commander (born circa [[:en:1539|1539 AD]] ?).

== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 13th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:684|684 AD]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:686|686 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – [[:en:Prince Ōtsu|Prince Ōtsu]] was captured by Crown Prince [[:en:Prince Kusakabe|Kusakabe]] on suspicion of treason. * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from [[:en:Jingo-keiun|Shingokeiun]] to Hōki. * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The grandson of [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]] , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Emperor Kōnin]] . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Miyajima|Battle of Itsukushima]] took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|ja|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Motonari|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1156545}} defeating those of [[:en:Sue Harukata|Tōharaken]] . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587 AD]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Tenmangū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} precincts, where [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] , with tea masters [[:en:Sen no Rikyū|Sen no Rikyū]] , [[:en:Tsuda Sōgyū|Tsuda Sōkyū]] , and [[:en:Imai Sōkyū|Imai Sōkyū]] , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614 AD]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1673|1673 AD]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – The [[:en:Iwakuni Domain|Iwakuni Domain]] constructed the [[:en:Kintai Bridge|Kintaikyo Bridge]] .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Sue Harukata|Tōharaken]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1521|1521 AD]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Mitsunari|Ishida Mitsunari]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1560|1560 AD]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konishi Yukinaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] ?). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – [[:en:Ankokuji Ekei|Angokuji Eikyū]] , a military commander (born circa [[:en:1539|1539 AD]] ?).

== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 13th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:684|684 AD]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:686|686 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – [[:en:Prince Ōtsu|Prince Ōtsu]] was captured by Crown Prince [[:en:Prince Kusakabe|Kusakabe]] on suspicion of treason. * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from [[:en:Jingo-keiun|Shingokeiun]] to Hōki. * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The grandson of [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]] , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Emperor Kōnin]] . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Miyajima|Battle of Itsukushima]] took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|ja|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Motonari|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1156545}} defeating those of [[:en:Sue Harukata|Tōharaken]] . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587 AD]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Tenmangū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} precincts, where [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] , with tea masters [[:en:Sen no Rikyū|Sen no Rikyū]] , [[:en:Tsuda Sōgyū|Tsuda Sōkyū]] , and [[:en:Imai Sōkyū|Imai Sōkyū]] , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614 AD]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1673|1673 AD]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – The [[:en:Iwakuni Domain|Iwakuni Domain]] constructed the [[:en:Kintai Bridge|Kintaikyo Bridge]] .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Sue Harukata|Tōharaken]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1521|1521 AD]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Mitsunari|Ishida Mitsunari]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1560|1560 AD]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konishi Yukinaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] ?). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – [[:en:Ankokuji Ekei|Angokuji Eikyū]] , a military commander (born circa [[:en:1539|1539 AD]] ?).

Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] , with tea masters [[:en:Sen no Rikyū|Sen no Rikyū]] , [[:en:Tsuda Sōgyū|Tsuda Sōkyū]] , and [[:en:Imai Sōkyū|Imai Sōkyū]] , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614 AD]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1673|1673 AD]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – The [[:en:Iwakuni Domain|Iwakuni Domain]] constructed the [[:en:Kintai Bridge|Kintaikyo Bridge]] .

== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 13th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:684|684 AD]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:686|686 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – [[:en:Prince Ōtsu|Prince Ōtsu]] was captured by Crown Prince [[:en:Prince Kusakabe|Kusakabe]] on suspicion of treason. * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from [[:en:Jingo-keiun|Shingokeiun]] to Hōki. * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The grandson of [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]] , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Emperor Kōnin]] . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Miyajima|Battle of Itsukushima]] took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|ja|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Motonari|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1156545}} defeating those of [[:en:Sue Harukata|Tōharaken]] . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587 AD]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Tenmangū|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} precincts, where [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] , with tea masters [[:en:Sen no Rikyū|Sen no Rikyū]] , [[:en:Tsuda Sōgyū|Tsuda Sōkyū]] , and [[:en:Imai Sōkyū|Imai Sōkyū]] , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614 AD]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1673|1673 AD]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – The [[:en:Iwakuni Domain|Iwakuni Domain]] constructed the [[:en:Kintai Bridge|Kintaikyo Bridge]] .

calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:686|686 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – [[:en:Prince Ōtsu|Prince Ōtsu]] was captured by Crown Prince [[:en:Prince Kusakabe|Kusakabe]] on suspicion of treason. * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from [[:en:Jingo-keiun|Shingokeiun]] to Hōki. * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The grandson of [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]] , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Emperor Kōnin]] . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Miyajima|Battle of Itsukushima]] took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|ja|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Motonari|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1156545}} defeating those of [[:en:Sue Harukata|Tōharaken]] . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587 AD]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Tenmangū|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} precincts, where [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] , with tea masters [[:en:Sen no Rikyū|Sen no Rikyū]] , [[:en:Tsuda Sōgyū|Tsuda Sōkyū]] , and [[:en:Imai Sōkyū|Imai Sōkyū]] , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614 AD]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1673|1673 AD]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – The [[:en:Iwakuni Domain|Iwakuni Domain]] constructed the [[:en:Kintai Bridge|Kintaikyo Bridge]] .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Sue Harukata|Tōharaken]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1521|1521 AD]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Mitsunari|Ishida Mitsunari]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1560|1560 AD]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konishi Yukinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] ?). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – [[:en:Ankokuji Ekei|Angokuji Eikyū]] , a military commander (born circa [[:en:1539|1539 AD]] ?).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 1일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 13th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:684|684 AD]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:686|686 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – [[:en:Prince Ōtsu|Prince Ōtsu]] was captured by Crown Prince [[:en:Prince Kusakabe|Kusakabe]] on suspicion of treason. * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from [[:en:Jingo-keiun|Shingokeiun]] to Hōki. * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The grandson of [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]] , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Emperor Kōnin]] . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Miyajima|Battle of Itsukushima]] took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|ja|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Motonari|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1156545}} defeating those of [[:en:Sue Harukata|Tōharaken]] . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587 AD]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Tenmangū|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} precincts, where [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] , with tea masters [[:en:Sen no Rikyū|Sen no Rikyū]] , [[:en:Tsuda Sōgyū|Tsuda Sōkyū]] , and [[:en:Imai Sōkyū|Imai Sōkyū]] , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614 AD]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1673|1673 AD]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – The [[:en:Iwakuni Domain|Iwakuni Domain]] constructed the [[:en:Kintai Bridge|Kintaikyo Bridge]] .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Sue Harukata|Tōharaken]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1521|1521 AD]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Mitsunari|Ishida Mitsunari]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1560|1560 AD]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konishi Yukinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] ?). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – [[:en:Ankokuji Ekei|Angokuji Eikyū]] , a military commander (born circa [[:en:1539|1539 AD]] ?).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月1日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 1일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月初一]][[zh:十月初一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840217]] Wikidata name: 1st day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 1|qq=October 1}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 1일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 13th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:684|684 AD]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:686|686 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – [[:en:Prince Ōtsu|Prince Ōtsu]] was captured by Crown Prince [[:en:Prince Kusakabe|Kusakabe]] on suspicion of treason. * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from [[:en:Jingo-keiun|Shingokeiun]] to Hōki. * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The grandson of [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]] , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Emperor Kōnin]] . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Miyajima|Battle of Itsukushima]] took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|ja|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Motonari|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1156545}} defeating those of [[:en:Sue Harukata|Tōharaken]] . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587 AD]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Tenmangū|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} precincts, where [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] , with tea masters [[:en:Sen no Rikyū|Sen no Rikyū]] , [[:en:Tsuda Sōgyū|Tsuda Sōkyū]] , and [[:en:Imai Sōkyū|Imai Sōkyū]] , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614 AD]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1673|1673 AD]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – The [[:en:Iwakuni Domain|Iwakuni Domain]] constructed the [[:en:Kintai Bridge|Kintaikyo Bridge]] .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Sue Harukata|Tōharaken]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1521|1521 AD]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Mitsunari|Ishida Mitsunari]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1560|1560 AD]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konishi Yukinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] ?). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – [[:en:Ankokuji Ekei|Angokuji Eikyū]] , a military commander (born circa [[:en:1539|1539 AD]] ?).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|30|10|2|9|1|11|10|1001|qq=}}

[[:en:Imai Sōkyū|Imai Sōkyū]] , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614 AD]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1673|1673 AD]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – The [[:en:Iwakuni Domain|Iwakuni Domain]] constructed the [[:en:Kintai Bridge|Kintaikyo Bridge]] .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Sue Harukata|Tōharaken]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1521|1521 AD]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Mitsunari|Ishida Mitsunari]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1560|1560 AD]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konishi Yukinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] ?). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – [[:en:Ankokuji Ekei|Angokuji Eikyū]] , a military commander (born circa [[:en:1539|1539 AD]] ?).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月1日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 1일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月初一]][[zh:十月初一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840217]] Wikidata name: 1st day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 1|qq=October 1}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 1일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 13th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:684|684 AD]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:686|686 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – [[:en:Prince Ōtsu|Prince Ōtsu]] was captured by Crown Prince [[:en:Prince Kusakabe|Kusakabe]] on suspicion of treason. * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from [[:en:Jingo-keiun|Shingokeiun]] to Hōki. * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The grandson of [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]] , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Emperor Kōnin]] . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Miyajima|Battle of Itsukushima]] took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|ja|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Motonari|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1156545}} defeating those of [[:en:Sue Harukata|Tōharaken]] . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587 AD]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Tenmangū|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} precincts, where [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] , with tea masters [[:en:Sen no Rikyū|Sen no Rikyū]] , [[:en:Tsuda Sōgyū|Tsuda Sōkyū]] , and [[:en:Imai Sōkyū|Imai Sōkyū]] , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614 AD]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1673|1673 AD]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – The [[:en:Iwakuni Domain|Iwakuni Domain]] constructed the [[:en:Kintai Bridge|Kintaikyo Bridge]] .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Sue Harukata|Tōharaken]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1521|1521 AD]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Mitsunari|Ishida Mitsunari]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1560|1560 AD]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konishi Yukinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] ?). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – [[:en:Ankokuji Ekei|Angokuji Eikyū]] , a military commander (born circa [[:en:1539|1539 AD]] ?).

Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 13th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:684|684 AD]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:686|686 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – [[:en:Prince Ōtsu|Prince Ōtsu]] was captured by Crown Prince [[:en:Prince Kusakabe|Kusakabe]] on suspicion of treason. * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from [[:en:Jingo-keiun|Shingokeiun]] to Hōki. * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The grandson of [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]] , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Emperor Kōnin]] . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Miyajima|Battle of Itsukushima]] took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|ja|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Motonari|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1156545}} defeating those of [[:en:Sue Harukata|Tōharaken]] . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587 AD]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Tenmangū|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} precincts, where [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] , with tea masters [[:en:Sen no Rikyū|Sen no Rikyū]] , [[:en:Tsuda Sōgyū|Tsuda Sōkyū]] , and [[:en:Imai Sōkyū|Imai Sōkyū]] , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614 AD]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1673|1673 AD]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – The [[:en:Iwakuni Domain|Iwakuni Domain]] constructed the [[:en:Kintai Bridge|Kintaikyo Bridge]] .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Sue Harukata|Tōharaken]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1521|1521 AD]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Mitsunari|Ishida Mitsunari]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1560|1560 AD]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konishi Yukinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] ?). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – [[:en:Ankokuji Ekei|Angokuji Eikyū]] , a military commander (born circa [[:en:1539|1539 AD]] ?).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 1일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 13th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:684|684 AD]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:686|686 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – [[:en:Prince Ōtsu|Prince Ōtsu]] was captured by Crown Prince [[:en:Prince Kusakabe|Kusakabe]] on suspicion of treason. * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from [[:en:Jingo-keiun|Shingokeiun]] to Hōki. * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The grandson of [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]] , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Emperor Kōnin]] . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Miyajima|Battle of Itsukushima]] took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|ja|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Motonari|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1156545}} defeating those of [[:en:Sue Harukata|Tōharaken]] . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587 AD]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Tenmangū|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} precincts, where [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] , with tea masters [[:en:Sen no Rikyū|Sen no Rikyū]] , [[:en:Tsuda Sōgyū|Tsuda Sōkyū]] , and [[:en:Imai Sōkyū|Imai Sōkyū]] , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614 AD]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1673|1673 AD]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – The [[:en:Iwakuni Domain|Iwakuni Domain]] constructed the [[:en:Kintai Bridge|Kintaikyo Bridge]] .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Sue Harukata|Tōharaken]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1521|1521 AD]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Mitsunari|Ishida Mitsunari]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1560|1560 AD]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konishi Yukinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] ?). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – [[:en:Ankokuji Ekei|Angokuji Eikyū]] , a military commander (born circa [[:en:1539|1539 AD]] ?).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 1일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 13th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:684|684 AD]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ) – Established the eight types of surnames: Mahito, Asomi, Sukune, Kisune, Dōshi, Omi, Ren, and Inaoki. {{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:686|686 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – [[:en:Prince Ōtsu|Prince Ōtsu]] was captured by Crown Prince [[:en:Prince Kusakabe|Kusakabe]] on suspicion of treason. * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – By the presentation of Suikime, the era was changed from [[:en:Jingo-keiun|Shingokeiun]] to Hōki. * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770 AD]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The grandson of [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]] , Prince Shirakabe, ascended to the throne as the 49th Emperor, [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Emperor Kōnin]] . * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Miyajima|Battle of Itsukushima]] took place, with the forces of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|ja|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Motonari|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1156545}} defeating those of [[:en:Sue Harukata|Tōharaken]] . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587 AD]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – The Kitano Grand Tea Ceremony was held in Kyoto’s {{ill|Kitano Tenmangū|ja|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Tenmangū|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} precincts, where [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] , with tea masters [[:en:Sen no Rikyū|Sen no Rikyū]] , [[:en:Tsuda Sōgyū|Tsuda Sōkyū]] , and [[:en:Imai Sōkyū|Imai Sōkyū]] , presided over a gathering of 1,000 participants. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614 AD]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ordered various daimyō to mobilize, marking the beginning of the Osaka Winter Campaign. * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1673|1673 AD]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – The [[:en:Iwakuni Domain|Iwakuni Domain]] constructed the [[:en:Kintai Bridge|Kintaikyo Bridge]] .
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Sue Harukata|Tōharaken]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1521|1521 AD]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Mitsunari|Ishida Mitsunari]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1560|1560 AD]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|Konishi Yukinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konishi Yukinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , a Christian daimyō (born circa [[:en:1555|1555 AD]] ?). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600 AD]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – [[:en:Ankokuji Ekei|Angokuji Eikyū]] , a military commander (born circa [[:en:1539|1539 AD]] ?).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
